name: Universal Global Hub Inc.
summary: Universal Global Hub Inc. does not have significant operations. The company focuses on seeking out a new and profitable operating business. Previously, it provided fintech services. The company was formerly known as Ecard Inc. and changed its name to Universal Global Hub Inc. in March 2021. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Fresh Meadows, New York. Universal Global Hub Inc. is a subsidiary of Eastone Equities, LLC.
